headline: Paramount Skydance Deal Reshapes Warner Bros Discovery Outlook After Netflix Exit
summary: Paramount Skydance has signed a definitive agreement to acquire Warner Bros. Discovery, setting the stage for a major media merger. Netflix has formally withdrawn its competing bid after extensive regulatory and political scrutiny of potential deals. The transaction includes plans to combine streaming offerings while keeping key cable networks under the new corporate umbrella. Political reactions, anticipated regulatory review, executive share sales and possible job cuts are already in focus...
